character_dossiers.name: Hands
character_dossiers.biography: A coxswain who was shot and drowned after falling from the cross-trees. His body lay on the sand near the ship.

character_dossiers.name: Israel
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who fell from the cross-trees and died. His body was found near the ship's bulwarks.

character_dossiers.name: O'Brien
character_dossiers.biography: A dead man thrown overboard after being shot and drowned. Described as bald and lying beside Israel's body in the water.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A marooned man encountered earlier by the narrator. The narrator walks cautiously near his location.
